zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey de Totehyll於1482年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親John William De Totehyll20歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Wells20歲。他於1499年與Elizabeth Wood在英國戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1537年在英國諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特享年55歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey de Totehyll于1482年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲John William De Totehyll20岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Wells20岁。他于1499年与Elizabeth Wood在英国戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1537年在英国諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特享年55岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾伍德福特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey de Totehyll was born in 1482, in Staffordshire, England, his father, John William De Totehyll, was 20 and his mother, Mary Elizabeth Wells, was 20. He married Elizabeth Wood in 1499, in Exeter, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1537, in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 55, and was buried in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey de Totehyll est né en 1482, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, John William De Totehyll, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Wells, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Wood en 1499, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1537, à Woodford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Woodford, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey de Totehyll 1482 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John William De Totehyll 20 und seine Mutter Mary Elizabeth Wells 20. Er hat 1499 in Exeter, Devon, England Elizabeth Wood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1537 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Woodford, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey de Totehyll è nato il nel 1482 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, John William De Totehyll, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Mary Elizabeth Wells, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Wood nel 1499, nel Exeter, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1537, nel Woodford, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Woodford, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Totehyllが1482年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John William De Totehyllは20歳，母Mary Elizabeth Wellsは20歳であった。1499年にイギリスデボンエクセターでElizabeth Woodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1537年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウッドフォードで55歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウッドフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey de Totehyll(이)가 1482년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John William De Totehyll(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Wells(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1499년 영국 데폰 세터에서 Elizabeth Wood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1537년 영국 노르섬프토실르 우드퍼드에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 우드퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey de Totehyll nasceu em 1482, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John William De Totehyll, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Wells, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Wood em 1499, em Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1537, em Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey de Totehyll родился в 1482 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John William De Totehyll было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Wells, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Wood в 1499 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1537 г. в местности вудфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности вудфорд, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey de Totehyll nació en 1482, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John William De Totehyll, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth Wells, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Wood en 1499, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1537, en Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Woodford, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
